age_range.evidence: The workshop was conducted with children aged between 10 and 11 years.

countries.evidence: The workshop was conducted at Lorena Falasco Elementary School in Los Banos, California.

fieldwork_year.evidence: Interaction Design and Children (IDC’20 Extended Abstracts), June 21–24, 2020

gender_split.evidence: 8 of them were female and 6 were male.

sample_size.evidence: 14 students took part in the workshop.
